overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing the protagonist walking through a historic Parisian plaza during golden hour, entering a grand palace through an archway, and exploring an interior courtyard. The scene features detailed 18th-century French architecture, NPCs in period clothing, and warm autumn lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic palace plaza with wooden bridge approach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across wooden planks and cobblestones toward the palace entrance, navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking toward the palace entrance

entered.detail: ornate stone facade with tall windows and sculptural details
weathered wooden walkway leading to the plaza
tall carved stone pillar with decorative reliefs
geometrically shaped boxwood hedges in wooden planters
deciduous trees with yellow-orange autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wooden bridge onto a cobblestone plaza bathed in golden hour sunlight. The historic palace facade dominates the view ahead, flanked by autumn trees and trimmed hedges. Pedestrians in 18th-century attire stroll through the plaza as the character approaches the grand entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand palace entrance with red carpet

events.description: character steps from open plaza into the covered palace entrance archway
bright golden hour sunlight transitions to shadowed interior lighting

agents.ego_description: walking up the red carpet through the grand archway, passing between open iron gates

notable_agents.action: palace guards standing at attention flanking the entrance

entered.detail: massive stone archway with ornate carvings and keystone
black wrought iron gates opened inward
crimson carpet runner leading through the entrance
classical stone sculptures on pedestals flanking the entrance
blue white and red vertical banners hanging from the facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters the palace through a grand stone archway, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowed interior. A red carpet leads between open iron gates, with stone statues and French flags framing the entrance. Guards stand at attention as the character moves into the covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone passage with barrel storage

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly covered passage toward the bright courtyard exit ahead

entered.detail: series of stone arches creating a covered walkway
thick stone pillars supporting the passage ceiling
stacked wooden casks and barrels along the passage wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow covered passage with stone columns and arches, transitioning from the entrance to the interior courtyard. Wooden barrels line the walls as natural light streams in from the far end, illuminating the red carpet path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit interior courtyard with dirt ground

events.description: exits covered passage into open interior courtyard
shadowed interior transitions to bright sunlight in courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, observing the architecture and passing by wooden scaffolding and hay bales

notable_agents.action: man sitting on the dirt ground resting against a fence

entered.detail: multi-story stone building wings surrounding the courtyard with arched windows
row of stone arches forming a covered walkway along the building
white-painted wooden railings sectioning off areas of the courtyard
unpaved earth and sand covering the courtyard center
stacked rectangular hay bales near wooden carts
temporary wooden structure with stairs against the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the passage into a sunlit interior courtyard surrounded by historic stone buildings. The ground transitions from cobblestone to dirt, with wooden fencing and hay bales scattered about. The character explores the open space, passing wooden scaffolding and arched colonnades while the sun casts long shadows across the courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded courtyard corner with stone benches

events.description: moves from bright sunlight into shadowed area near the building wall

agents.ego_description: turning left to explore the shaded perimeter of the courtyard, approaching a dark archway

entered.detail: dark stone archway leading to another section of the palace
carved stone seating along the building wall
tall narrow evergreen trees in large stone planters

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a shaded corner of the courtyard where the lighting dims significantly. Stone benches and potted cypress trees line the cobblestone path as the character approaches a dark archway. The wooden scaffolding and open dirt area fall behind as the exploration continues along the building's perimeter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched public plaza into the shadowed, secluded depths of a grand palace interior. It begins as the character crosses a wooden bridge onto a cobblestone plaza bathed in golden hour light, moving past autumn trees and pedestrians toward a towering palace facade. As the character passes through a grand stone archway, the bright sunlight gives way to the cool shadows of a covered passage lined with stone columns and wooden barrels. The scene then opens into a sunlit interior courtyard where the ground shifts from cobblestone to dirt and hay, with the camera gliding past wooden scaffolding and arched colonnades. Finally, the light dims significantly as the character moves into a shaded corner of the perimeter, passing potted cypress trees and stone benches toward a dark, distant archway.
